headline: Jacobs Solutions Deepens UK Utility Role With AI And Grid Cyber Wins
summary: Jacobs Solutions (NYSE:J) has secured multiple high-value frameworks from SSEN Transmission to modernize Northern Scotland’s electricity network. The company will provide operational technology cybersecurity and AI-enabled digital services to support grid resilience and renewable integration. Jacobs has also entered an AI-focused partnership with Yorkshire Water to improve operational efficiency and customer outcomes. For investors tracking NYSE:J, this news sits squarely in Jacobs...
